productDisplayName: United Colors Of Benetton Women Light Winter Purple Tops
description: Composition Light and dark purple Stripesd knit top made of 100% cotton, with dolman sleeves that have ribbed hems, ribbed round neckline, stitch detailing on the front and has a ribbed hem with a drawcord Fitting Comfort Wash care Wash, dry and iron inside out Machine wash delicate at 30 degrees with a mild detergent Do not scrub, bleach, wring, tumble dry or dry clean Dry flat in shade Cool iron, but do not iron on print or embroidery Enjoy the winter in style in this knit top from united colors of benetton. The dolman sleeves coupled with the ribbed hem at the waist allow the top to fall free over your torso, while you can further customise the Fit around your waist with the drawcord. Pair this with jeans or skirts and sports shoes for unparalleled cool. Model statistics The model wears size M in tops Height: 5'8", Chest: 33"
